# ModgillTravels — Taxi Service in Patiala, Punjab

## About
ModgillTravels is a 24/7 outstation and local taxi service based in Patiala, Punjab, India. Founded in 2025, we have completed 5,000+ trips across Punjab, Haryana, Himachal Pradesh, and Delhi NCR.

Contact: +91-62849-92669
WhatsApp: https://wa.me/916284992669
Email: modgilltravels@gmail.com
Address: Urban Estate, Phase 2, Near Police Station, Patiala, Punjab 147001

## Services
- One-way outstation taxi from Patiala (no return charges)
- Round-trip outstation cab with driver allowance included
- Local taxi service within Patiala (hourly rental from 4 hours)
- Airport pickup and drop (Delhi, Chandigarh, Amritsar airports)
- 24/7 availability including late nights, early mornings, and holidays

## Vehicle Types
- Sedan (Swift Dzire / Toyota Etios) — up to 4 passengers
- Ertiga / Innova (MUV) — up to 6 passengers
- Innova Crysta (SUV) — up to 7 passengers
All vehicles are air-conditioned with GPS tracking and verified drivers.

## Popular Routes & Fares (One-Way)
- Patiala to Delhi: 240 km, ~4.5 hours, Sedan from ₹3,400
- Patiala to Chandigarh: 67 km, ~1.5 hours, Sedan from ₹1,400
- Patiala to Shimla: 180 km, ~4.5 hours, Sedan from ₹2,600
- Patiala to Manali: 301 km, ~7 hours, Sedan from ₹5,400
- Patiala to Amritsar: 130 km, ~2.5 hours, Sedan from ₹2,200
- Patiala to Ludhiana: 72 km, ~1.5 hours, Sedan from ₹1,500
- Patiala to Ambala: 56 km, ~1 hour, Sedan from ₹1,200
- Delhi to Patiala: 240 km, ~4.5 hours, Sedan from ₹3,400

## Cities Served
Patiala, Delhi, Chandigarh, Shimla, Manali, Ludhiana, Jalandhar, Amritsar, Ambala, Bathinda, Ropar, Mohali, Dharamshala, Dalhousie

## Key Facts
- Ratings: 5.0/5 (31 Google reviews)
- Price range: ₹1,200 – ₹8,000+ depending on route and vehicle
- Payment accepted: Cash, UPI, Credit Card, Debit Card, Bank Transfer
- Languages: English, Hindi, Punjabi
- Booking: WhatsApp or call +91-62849-92669
